title: SQL Injection Vulnerability Audit
description: Audit the provided code for SQL injection vulnerabilities. The code contains multiple instances of unsafe SQL concatenation in a user API endpoint. This tests Pentest AI's ability to identify security vulnerabilities, understand attack vectors, and propose specific remediation steps.

verification.command: grep -c 'SQL INJECTION VULNERABILITY' /tmp/users-routes.js | grep -q '[5-9]\|[1-9][0-9]' && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'
